i: SMA (Superintendencia del Medio Ambiente) — Chile's สิ่งแวดล้อม enforcement agency, responsible for monitoring compliance with สิ่งแวดล้อม permits (RCA — Resolución de Calificación Ambiental). SMA can impose fines up to $8.2M and order facility closure. DGA (Dirección General de Aguas) — the national water authority managing water rights and monitoring extraction. SEA (Servicio de Evaluación Ambiental) — conducts สิ่งแวดล้อม impact assessments for เหมืองแร่ projects.

CODELCO (Corporación Nacional del Cobre) — Chile's ของรัฐ copper company and the world's largest copper producer. CODELCO operates Chuquicamata, El Teniente, and other major mines. SQM (Sociedad Química y Minera de Chile) — one of the world's largest lithium producers, operating in the Salar de Atacama. Albemarle — US company operating lithium extraction in the Salar de Atacama alongside SQM. BHP, Anglo American — major international copper เหมืองแร่ companies operating in Chile.

Sernageomin (Servicio Nacional de Geología y Minería) — the national geological and เหมืองแร่ service, responsible for mine safety, tailings dam oversight, and geological surveys. Chile has over 740 tailings facilities, the largest inventory in the world. Ministry of Mining — oversees เหมืองแร่ policy including the 2023 National Lithium Strategy, which established state-led lithium development through public-private partnerships.

Congreso Nacional de Chile — bicameral legislature consisting of the Cámara de Diputadas y Diputados (155 members) and the Senado (50 members). Citizens can contact representatives through camara.cl and senado.cl. Chile is an OECD member with strong democratic institutions. Escazú Agreement — the Regional Agreement on Access to Information, Public Participation and Justice in Environmental Matters in Latin America and the Caribbean. Chile signed but has not ratified.

CM.s: Central African เศรษฐกิจ ($53.3B GDP) with oil production (2.94% combined rents) and significant agriculture (18.5% GDP — cocoa, palm oil, timber). Forest cover declining due to logging and agricultural expansion. Governance challenges and Anglophone crisis.

sectors.w: Cameroon's oil production is declining from mature fields. As extraction costs rise, the ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อน between operators (Perenco, Addax) and government revenue อ่อนแอลง — diversification to sustainable forestry and agriculture becomes economically rational.
bp: Redirect declining oil revenues to sustainable forest management and agricultural diversification. Cameroon's forests are a carbon sink worth more standing than cleared. เมื่อ REDD+ payments exceed marginal oil revenue, ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อนใน continued extraction breaks.
ดำเนินการ EITI-standard per-block สิ่งแวดล้อม disclosure. Cameroon's EITI membership provides the framework — extending to สิ่งแวดล้อม data makes W computable.
ทำลายไม่ได้ by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ by conservation of mass.
a: Report สิ่งแวดล้อม violations to MINEPDED (Ministry of Environment, Nature Protection and Sustainable พัฒนาment)
Document illegal logging or land seizures — report to international forestry monitoring organizations (Global Forest Watch)

Perenco, Addax/Sinopec: ดำเนินการ สิ่งแวดล้อม monitoring and การปล่อยมลพิษ reporting for all Cameroon operations

ผลักดัน EITI enhanced reporting
i: MINEPDED (Ministère de l'Environnement, de la Protection de la Nature et du Développement Durable) — Cameroon's environment ministry. SNH (Société Nationale des Hydrocarbures) — the national hydrocarbons company managing state interests in oil and gas. EITI Cameroon — member since 2007. Note: Whistleblower protections are limited.

Perenco — the largest oil producer in Cameroon. Addax Petroleum (Sinopec subsidiary) — operates offshore concessions. SNH manages the state's petroleum interests and holds equity in production sharing contracts.

MINMIDT (Ministère des Mines, de l'Industrie et du Développement Technologique) — oversees เหมืองแร่ and industrial policy. CONAC (Commission Nationale Anti-Corruption) — Cameroon's anti-corruption commission.

Assemblée nationale du Cameroun — 180 members. Sénat — 100 members. Note: Cameroon's democratic institutions are constrained under long-ruling President Paul Biya (in power since 1982). International channels: CEMAC, African Union, CAFI.

CO.s: Major Latin American เศรษฐกิจ ($418.8B GDP) with significant oil (3.42% rents) and coal (0.73% rents) production. Ecopetrol is the largest company. Biodiversity hotspot (most biodiverse country per square kilometer). 2016 peace agreement with FARC opened new governance challenges in former conflict zones.

sectors.w: Colombia's current administration (Petro, 2022-) has announced a policy of no new oil exploration licenses. If maintained, ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อนใน fossil fuel expansion breaks as existing fields deplete. Colombia's renewable potential (hydro, solar, wind) provides viable alternatives.
bp: Maintain and implement the no-new-exploration-licenses policy while investing transition revenues in พลังงานหมุนเวียน. เมื่อ energy investment flows shift from fossil to renewable, ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อนใน continued exploration breaks.

Mandatory ต่อแหล่ง การปล่อยมลพิษ disclosure for all Ecopetrol and international operator fields. Colombia's ANH (Agencia Nacional de Hidrocarburos) already collects production data — extending to การปล่อยมลพิษ makes W computable.
ทำลายไม่ได้ by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ by conservation of mass.

Document community health impacts near oil operations — report to Defensoría del Pueblo
Report through Ecopetrol's ethics line or international operator compliance channels
Ecopetrol: Accelerate energy transition strategy with binding renewable targets
ดำเนินการ TCFD-aligned reporting across all operations
ลงทุนใน พลังงานหมุนเวียน in post-conflict zones to provide economic alternatives

Leverage OECD membership to advance สิ่งแวดล้อม governance standards

i: ANLA (Autoridad Nacional de Licencias Ambientales) — Colombia's สิ่งแวดล้อม licensing authority, responsible for สิ่งแวดล้อม impact assessment and compliance monitoring for extractive projects. Defensoría del Pueblo — the national human rights ombudsman. Contraloría General de la República — the national audit office overseeing public resource management including oil revenues.

Ecopetrol — Colombia's largest company (88.5% ของรัฐ), responsible for most domestic oil production. Ecopetrol has announced energy transition targets but continues significant upstream investment. ANH (Agencia Nacional de Hidrocarburos) — manages exploration and production contracts.

MinAmbiente (Ministerio de Ambiente y Desarrollo Sostenible) — Colombia's environment ministry. CREG (Comisión de Regulación de Energía y Gas) — the หน่วยงานกำกับดูแลพลังงานy commission. CAR (Corporaciones Autónomas Regionales) — regional สิ่งแวดล้อม authorities.

Congreso de la República de Colombia — bicameral legislature: Cámara de Representantes (188 members) and Senado (108 members). Contact through camara.gov.co and senado.gov.co. Colombia is an OECD member (2020) with strong democratic institutions. The 2016 Peace Agreement (Acuerdo de Paz) created new governance frameworks for former conflict zones that intersect with extractive industry regulation.

CR.s: Upper-middle-income เศรษฐกิจ ($95.4B GDP) with 98%+ renewable electricity generation. No military since 1948. Services-dominant (68.8% GDP). Leader in ecotourism and สิ่งแวดล้อม policy. Low direct fossil fuel extraction. Main PST exposure through agricultural monoculture (pineapple, banana, palm oil).

sectors.w: Costa Rica's pineapple and banana monoculture uses intensive pesticide application that contaminates waterways. เมื่อ per-farm pesticide runoff and water contamination data is published alongside export revenue, W คำนวณได้.
bp: ปฏิรูป agricultural export incentives to reward biodiversity-positive farming. เมื่อ export tax benefits require สิ่งแวดล้อม certification, the ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อน between monoculture producers and exporters in chemical-intensive production อ่อนแอลง.

Mandatory per-farm water quality monitoring downstream of monoculture operations. Costa Rica's AyA (water utility) and SINAC already collect water data — linking to agricultural output makes W computable.
ทำลายได้บางส่วน. Tropical monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. However, Costa Rica's Payment for Environmental Services (PSA) program demonstrates viable alternatives.
a: Report pesticide violations to SFE (Servicio Fitosanitario del Estado)
Document water contamination — report to MINAE (Ministry of Environment) or AyA
Use Costa Rica's labor protections and สิ่งแวดล้อม complaint mechanisms

ลงทุนใน organic certification and agroforestry transitions
ดำเนินการ watershed-level สิ่งแวดล้อม monitoring
MAG (Ministry of Agriculture): ปฏิรูป export incentives to require สิ่งแวดล้อม certification
MINAE: เสริมสร้าง pesticide regulations and enforce water quality standards near monoculture areas
SETENA: Require cumulative สิ่งแวดล้อม impact assessments for monoculture expansion

Support the Escazú Agreement implementation (Costa Rica was an early advocate)
Leverage Costa Rica's สิ่งแวดล้อม reputation to advance international agricultural sustainability standards
ผลักดัน green trade provisions in bilateral agreements
i: SFE (Servicio Fitosanitario del Estado) — the state phytosanitary service regulating pesticide use. MINAE (Ministerio de Ambiente y Energía) — the environment and energy ministry. AyA (Instituto Costarricense de Acueductos y Alcantarillados) — the national water utility. SETENA (Secretaría Técnica Nacional Ambiental) — conducts สิ่งแวดล้อม impact assessments.

Costa Rica hosts operations of major fruit multinationals: Del Monte, Dole, Chiquita. CORBANA (Corporación Bananera Nacional) — the national banana corporation coordinating the sector. CANAPEP (Cámara Nacional de Productores y Exportadores de Piña) — the pineapple producers' association.

MAG (Ministerio de Agricultura y Ganadería) — Costa Rica's agriculture ministry. The PSA (Pago por Servicios Ambientales) program — Costa Rica's pioneering payment for สิ่งแวดล้อม services program, which pays landowners to maintain forest cover, funded partly by a fuel tax.

Asamblea Legislativa de Costa Rica — unicameral parliament with 57 members. Citizens can contact representatives through asamblea.go.cr. Costa Rica is one of Latin America's strongest democracies and a global สิ่งแวดล้อม leader. The Escazú Agreement — Costa Rica was one of the first signatories of this regional agreement on สิ่งแวดล้อม access rights.

CU.s: Command เศรษฐกิจ ($107.4B GDP, though estimates vary due to dual currency system). Services-dominant (73.5% GDP, driven by healthcare, education, tourism). Minimal resource extraction. Economic crisis exacerbated by US embargo and collapse of Venezuelan oil subsidies.

sectors.w: Cuba's sugar industry collapsed after Soviet subsidies ended, but remaining agriculture (state farms, cooperatives) relies on monoculture patterns. Cuba's organic farming necessity (post-Soviet fertilizer shortage) demonstrates alternative models. Making soil health data visible breaks system independence.
bp: Expand the urban agriculture and organoponics model that Cuba developed out of necessity. เมื่อ organic production meets domestic food needs more reliably than import-dependent monoculture, ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อนใน conventional agriculture breaks.
Publish soil health, water quality, and biodiversity data from Cuba's extensive agricultural research system. Cuba's scientific institutions (INIFAT, ICA) generate data that could make W computable.
ทำลายได้บางส่วน. Cuba's experience with organic farming post-1991 shows that การพึ่งพาระบบ on chemical inputs can be dramatically reduced through agroecological methods.
a: Document สิ่งแวดล้อม degradation through academic research channels
Report through workplace union structures (CTC — Central de Trabajadores de Cuba)

i: Note: Cuba is a รัฐพรรคเดียว. Independent ภาคประชาสังคม, media, and labor organizations are not permitted. Reporting channels operate within state structures. CTC (Central de Trabajadores de Cuba) — the state-controlled trade union federation. INIFAT (Instituto Nacional de Investigaciones Fundamentales en Agricultura Tropical) — the national agricultural research institute. CITMA (Ministerio de Ciencia, Tecnología y Medio Ambiente) — the science and environment ministry.

AZCUBA (Empresa Azucarera) — Cuba's state sugar enterprise. State agricultural enterprises and UBPCs (Unidades Básicas de Producción Cooperativa) — cooperatives managing most agricultural production. Cuba's urban agriculture program is one of the world's most successful, producing significant food in cities through organoponics.

MINAG (Ministerio de la Agricultura) — Cuba's agriculture ministry. CITMA — oversees สิ่งแวดล้อม policy and scientific research. The Asociación Nacional de Agricultores Pequeños (ANAP) — the national small farmers' association, which has been a key partner in agroecological transition.

Note: Cuba's Asamblea Nacional del Poder Popular (605 members) is the legislature but functions within a one-party system. International engagement channels: FAO (Cuba has received recognition for reducing hunger), CELAC (Community of Latin American and Caribbean States), NAM (Non-Aligned Movement). Cuba's agroecological experience is studied globally as a model for post-petrochemical agriculture.

CY.s: Small EU island เศรษฐกิจ ($37.6B GDP) with dominant services sector (76.5% GDP, driven by financial services, shipping, and tourism). No significant resource extraction. Post-2013 banking crisis reforms strengthened financial regulation. Division between Republic of Cyprus and northern territory.

sectors.w: Cyprus's financial services sector has historically facilitated capital flows from Russia and other jurisdictions. EU AML directives and beneficial ownership ความโปร่งใส requirements make the welfare impact of opaque financial intermediation computable.
bp: Full implementation of EU Anti-Money Laundering Directives and beneficial ownership ความโปร่งใส. เมื่อ financial secrecy is eliminated, the ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อน between Cypriot service providers and clients seeking opacity อ่อนแอลง.

Mandatory publication of Country-by-Country Reporting (CbCR) data for entities registered in Cyprus. EU ATAD and DAC6 frameworks provide the mechanism — making tax planning structures visible breaks system independence.
ทำลายได้บางส่วน. Financial intermediation can relocate — but Cyprus's สมาชิกสหภาพยุโรปship, common law heritage, and timezone advantages create switching costs.
a: Report suspicious transactions to MOKAS (Unit for Combating Money Laundering)
Document beneficial ownership concealment — report to CySEC (Cyprus Securities and Exchange Commission)
Use EU Whistleblower Directive protections (transposed 2022)
ดำเนินการ enhanced due diligence for all high-risk client relationships
นำมาใช้ full beneficial ownership ความโปร่งใส ahead of EU AMLD6 requirements
Integrate ESG criteria into financial advisory services
CySEC: เสริมสร้าง beneficial ownership verification requirements
CBC: บังคับใช้ enhanced AML due diligence for correspondent banking relationships
ICPAC (Institute of Certified Public Accountants): Ensure audit firms enforce ความโปร่งใส standards
ติดต่อผู้แทนของคุณ Βουλευτής in the Βουλή των Αντιπροσώπων (House of Representatives) เพื่อเรียกร้อง full implementation of EU AML directives
Support EU AMLD6 negotiations for enhanced ความโปร่งใส requirements
Advocate for OECD BEPS Inclusive Framework strengthening
ผลักดัน EU-wide beneficial ownership registry interconnection
i: MOKAS (Μονάδα Καταπολέμησης Αδικημάτων Συγκάλυψης / Unit for Combating Money Laundering) — Cyprus's financial intelligence unit. CySEC (Cyprus Securities and Exchange Commission) — the securities and financial markets regulator. CBC (Central Bank of Cyprus) — the prudential supervisor of banks. Cyprus transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.

Cyprus hosts approximately 40 licensed banks and numerous investment firms. The Cyprus Investment Firms sector manages significant cross-border capital flows. CIFA (Cyprus Investment Funds Association) — the industry association representing investment fund managers.

CySEC — responsible for securities regulation and investment firm supervision. CBC (Central Bank of Cyprus) — conducts banking supervision and AML compliance monitoring. ICPAC — the professional body for accountants and auditors in Cyprus.

Βουλή των Αντιπροσώπων (House of Representatives) — unicameral parliament with 56 elected members (80 seats including 24 reserved for Turkish Cypriot community). Contact through parliament.cy. Cyprus is an สมาชิกสหภาพยุโรป with robust democratic institutions. Moneyval (Council of Europe's Committee of Experts on the Evaluation of Anti-Money Laundering Measures) evaluates Cyprus's AML framework.

CZ.s: Central European industrial เศรษฐกิจ ($347B GDP) with strong manufacturing (19.9% GDP, automotive-dominated). Small coal sector (lignite in northern Bohemia). สมาชิกสหภาพยุโรป. Significant nuclear energy capacity (Dukovany, Temelín). ภาคบริการที่ 60.2% GDP.

sectors.w: Czechia's lignite เหมืองแร่ is concentrated in the Ústí nad Labem region (Sokolovská uhelná, Severní energetická). EU ETS carbon pricing makes Czech lignite uncompetitive — the ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อน between mine operators and local employment breaks when carbon costs exceed revenue.
bp: Align with EU ETS carbon pricing and eliminate free allowances for Czech lignite power. เมื่อ plants pay the full carbon price, lignite electricity becomes more expensive than alternatives and the ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อน breaks.
Mandatory ต่อโรงงาน การปล่อยมลพิษ and health-impact reporting. Czech lignite plants cause significant air pollution — publishing health costs per MWh makes W computable.
ทำลายไม่ได้. Lignite combustion releases CO₂ and pollutants by physical process.
a: Report การปล่อยมลพิษ violations to ČIŽP (Czech Environmental Inspectorate)
Document health impacts in เหมืองแร่ communities — report to regional public health authorities
Use the Czech ผู้แจ้งเบาะแส protection law (zákon o ochraně oznamovatelů, 2023)
ČEZ (majority ของรัฐ): Accelerate coal phase-out timeline and พลังงานหมุนเวียน investment
Sev.en Energy: พัฒนา mine closure and site remediation plans
ลงทุนใน nuclear energy expansion as baseload alternative
ERÚ: ปฏิรูป electricity tariffs to reflect carbon costs

Support EU Just Transition Fund allocation for Ústí nad Labem and Moravian-Silesian regions
Advocate for accelerated EU ETS reform
ผลักดัน Territorial Just Transition Plans with concrete retraining programs
i: ČIŽP (Česká inspekce životního prostředí / Czech Environmental Inspectorate) — the enforcement agency for สิ่งแวดล้อม law, conducting inspections and imposing การคว่ำบาตร. MŽP (Ministerstvo životního prostředí / Ministry of the Environment) — oversees สิ่งแวดล้อม policy. Zákon o ochraně oznamovatelů (Act on Protection of Whistleblowers, 2023) — Czech transposition of EU Whistleblower Directive.

ČEZ Group — Czechia's largest energy company (70% ของรัฐ), operating coal, nuclear, and renewable power plants. Sev.en Energy — the largest private lignite เหมืองแร่ and power company. Sokolovská uhelná — operates lignite mines in the Sokolov basin.

ERÚ (Energetický regulační úřad / Energy Regulatory Office) — the independent หน่วยงานกำกับดูแลพลังงาน. Czech Coal Commission (Uhelná komise) — established to recommend a coal phase-out date. Recommended 2033, but implementation timelines remain debated.

Parlament České republiky — bicameral: Poslanecká sněmovna (200 members) and Senát (81 members). Contact through psp.cz and senat.cz. EU Just Transition Fund — Czechia is eligible for significant funding for coal-dependent regions.

DK.s: Advanced Nordic เศรษฐกิจ ($424.5B GDP) with global leadership in wind energy (Vestas, Ørsted). Intensive livestock agriculture (28M pigs for 5.8M people) creates significant nitrogen pollution. ภาคบริการที่ 63.5% GDP. World's most ambitious climate law (70% reduction by 2030).

sectors.w: Denmark's intensive pig farming generates nitrogen pollution visible in marine dead zones (inner Danish waters, Baltic Sea). EU Nitrates Directive compliance data makes W computable from farm-level nitrogen balance sheets.
bp: ปฏิรูป agricultural subsidies to penalize nitrogen surplus per hectare. เมื่อ the ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อน between livestock producers and feed importers is broken by internalizing the nitrogen externality, intensive livestock becomes unprofitable without subsidy.

Mandatory farm-level nitrogen and phosphorus balance disclosure. Denmark already has one of Europe's most detailed agricultural data systems — extending to mandatory public disclosure makes W computable.

ทำลายได้บางส่วน. Intensive livestock inherently concentrates nutrients beyond ecosystem absorption. However, Denmark's leadership in biogas from manure demonstrates การพึ่งพาระบบ can be reduced through circular nutrient management.
a: Report nitrogen limit violations to Miljøstyrelsen (Danish Environmental Protection Agency)
Document animal welfare violations — report to Fødevarestyrelsen
Use Danish ผู้แจ้งเบาะแส law (Lov om beskyttelse af ผู้แจ้งเบาะแสe, 2021)
Danish Crown, Arla: ลงทุนใน plant-based protein alternatives
ดำเนินการ nitrogen-neutral farming targets across supply chains
นำมาใช้ Scope 3 agricultural การปล่อยมลพิษ reporting
Miljøministeriet: Tighten nitrogen quotas for marine ecosystem recovery
Landbrugsstyrelsen: ปฏิรูป CAP eco-scheme payments to reward nitrogen-negative farming
ดำเนินการ the 2021 agreement on green transition of Danish agriculture (55-65% การปล่อยมลพิษ reduction by 2030)

Support EU-wide mandatory nitrogen balance disclosure
Advocate for carbon border adjustment on imported animal feed from การตัดไม้ทำลายป่า regions
ผลักดัน Baltic Sea Action Plan implementation through HELCOM
i: Miljøstyrelsen — responsible for สิ่งแวดล้อม regulation including agricultural การปล่อยมลพิษ and water quality. Fødevarestyrelsen (Danish Veterinary and Food Administration) — oversees food safety and animal welfare. Danish Whistleblower Act (2021) — transposition of EU Directive 2019/1937.
Danish Crown — one of Europe's largest meat processors (farmer cooperative). Arla Foods — multinational dairy cooperative headquartered in Denmark. DLG Group — major agricultural input cooperative.

Miljøministeriet (Ministry of Environment) — สิ่งแวดล้อม policy including agricultural regulation. Landbrugsstyrelsen (Danish Agricultural Agency) — administers CAP payments. The 2021 green agriculture agreement is one of Europe's most ambitious.

Folketinget — unicameral parliament (179 members). Contact through ft.dk. Klimaloven (Climate Act, 2020) — legally binding 70% การปล่อยมลพิษ reduction target by 2030. HELCOM (Helsinki Commission) — the governing body of the Convention on the Protection of the Marine Environment of the Baltic Sea Area.

DO.s: Caribbean's largest เศรษฐกิจ ($124.3B GDP) with tourism, manufacturing (free trade zones), and เหมืองแร่ (2.04% GDP — Pueblo Viejo gold mine, one of the world's largest). ภาคบริการที่ 59.8% GDP. Climate vulnerable — hurricanes and sea level rise.

sectors.w: Pueblo Viejo gold mine (Barrick Gold) generates cyanide and mercury contamination risks. เมื่อ ต่อเหมือง water quality and health data is published alongside production revenue, W คำนวณได้.
bp: Mandate สิ่งแวดล้อม bonds that fully internalize mine closure and remediation costs. เมื่อ เหมืองแร่ companies pre-fund cleanup, ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อนใน extraction without สิ่งแวดล้อม accountability อ่อนแอลง.
Mandatory water quality monitoring and health-impact disclosure per mine. Publishing downstream contamination data makes W computable from เหมืองแร่ revenue.
ทำลายได้บางส่วน. Open-pit เหมืองแร่ disturbs landscapes. However, improved tailings management and water treatment can reduce การพึ่งพาระบบ.
a: Report สิ่งแวดล้อม violations to the Ministry of Environment and Natural Resources
Document community health impacts — report to health authorities
Report through Barrick Gold's compliance channels
Barrick Gold (Pueblo Viejo): ดำเนินการ GISTM tailings management standards
นำมาใช้ full water quality disclosure for all operations
ลงทุนใน community development programs per เหมืองแร่ code requirements
Ministry of Energy and Mines: เสริมสร้าง สิ่งแวดล้อม conditions in เหมืองแร่ concessions
บังคับใช้ Mining Law 146-71 สิ่งแวดล้อม provisions
Publish เหมืองแร่ sector สิ่งแวดล้อม compliance data

Support EITI membership for the Dominican Republic
สนับสนุนผ่าน SICA for regional เหมืองแร่ สิ่งแวดล้อม standards
ผลักดัน เหมืองแร่ revenue ความโปร่งใส
i: Ministerio de Medio Ambiente y Recursos Naturales — the environment ministry. Dirección General de Minería — the เหมืองแร่ directorate under the Ministry of Energy and Mines. Defensor del Pueblo — the national ombudsman.
Barrick Gold — operates Pueblo Viejo, one of the world's largest gold mines (JV with Newmont). The mine produces ~800,000 ounces of gold annually.
Ministerio de Energía y Minas — oversees เหมืองแร่ policy. Ley 146-71 (Mining Law) — governs เหมืองแร่ concessions and สิ่งแวดล้อม obligations.
Congreso Nacional — bicameral: Cámara de Diputados (190 members) and Senado (32 members). The Dominican Republic is a presidential ประชาธิปไตย.

DZ.s: Major oil and gas producer ($269.3B GDP) with 22.46% combined oil and gas rents. Sonatrach is Africa's largest company. Economy heavily dependent on hydrocarbon exports (90%+ of export revenue). เกษตรกรรมที่ 14% GDP (primarily wheat and dates). Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Algeria's oil production is declining from mature Hassi Messaoud and Hassi R'Mel fields. As domestic energy consumption grows (population of 45M+), the exportable surplus shrinks. เมื่อ production costs exceed export revenue minus domestic consumption, ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อนใน continued expansion breaks.
bp: Redirect hydrocarbon revenues to solar energy (Algeria has the Sahara — one of Earth's highest solar irradiance zones). เมื่อ solar electricity is cheaper than burning domestically-consumed gas, ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อนใน gas-fired power generation breaks.

ดำเนินการ ต่อแหล่ง การปล่อยมลพิษ disclosure for Sonatrach operations. Algeria's massive gas flaring (visible from satellite) makes สิ่งแวดล้อม damage measurable — publishing this data makes W computable.
ทำลายไม่ได้ by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ by conservation of mass.
a: Report สิ่งแวดล้อม violations through Sonatrach internal channels
Document gas flaring data — report to Ministry of Energy and Mines
Report concerns to international partner compliance systems (Eni, TotalEnergies, Equinor)
Sonatrach: พัฒนา solar energy division using Saharan land bank
ดำเนินการ flaring reduction program
International partners (Eni, TotalEnergies): Apply global การปล่อยมลพิษ standards to Algerian operations
ALNAFT: เสริมสร้าง สิ่งแวดล้อม conditions in exploration and production contracts
CREG: Accelerate domestic พลังงานหมุนเวียน deployment (the PNER 2030 targets 22GW solar)
ARH: บังคับใช้ flaring reduction regulations
สนับสนุนผ่าน OPEC for managed production decline aligned with Paris Agreement
Support Mediterranean Solar Plan and Desertec-style initiatives for Saharan solar export
ผลักดัน EITI membership for Algeria
Leverage Algeria's gas supply role to Europe for energy transition dialogue
i: Sonatrach — Algeria's state oil and gas company, Africa's largest company by revenue. Sonatrach controls all upstream and downstream petroleum operations. Note: Algeria has limited press freedom and no comprehensive ผู้แจ้งเบาะแส protection. Independent reporting is constrained.
Sonatrach operates the world's longest natural gas pipelines (Transmed to Italy, MEG to Spain). Eni, TotalEnergies, Equinor, Occidental — major international partners in Algerian upstream operations.

ALNAFT (Agence Nationale pour la Valorisation des Ressources en Hydrocarbures) — the hydrocarbons regulatory agency managing licensing. CREG (Commission de Régulation de l'Électricité et du Gaz) — the electricity and gas regulatory commission. ARH (Autorité de Régulation des Hydrocarbures) — the hydrocarbons sector regulator.

Note: Algeria is rated 'Not Free' by Freedom House. The Assemblée populaire nationale (407 members) and Conseil de la Nation (174 members) do not function as independent democratic institutions. International channels: OPEC membership, Mediterranean dialogue (Union for the Mediterranean), African Union, Arab League. Algeria's strategic gas supply position (supplier to Italy, Spain via pipeline) gives it leverage in energy transition negotiations.

EC.s: Oil-dependent เศรษฐกิจ ($124.7B GDP) with 6.41% oil rents. PetroEcuador manages state interests. Extraordinary biodiversity (Galápagos, Amazon basin). The 2008 Constitution grants 'rights of nature' (Pachamama). เกษตรกรรมที่ 9.5% GDP (bananas, shrimp, cacao).

sectors.w: Ecuador's 2023 referendum voted to ban oil extraction in Yasuní National Park (one of the world's most biodiverse areas). This democratic decision to forgo extraction directly breaks the ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อน. Extending this precedent to other sensitive areas accelerates the transition.
bp: ดำเนินการ the Yasuní referendum result (ban extraction in ITT block) and extend the precedent to other ecologically sensitive areas. เมื่อ democratic decisions override extraction interests, the ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อน breaks through civic action.

Mandate per-block สิ่งแวดล้อม impact disclosure for all PetroEcuador and private operator fields. Ecuador's สิ่งแวดล้อม data (Amazon การตัดไม้ทำลายป่า, water contamination from legacy Texaco/Chevron operations) makes W measurable.
ทำลายไม่ได้ by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ by conservation of mass.
a: Report สิ่งแวดล้อม violations to MAATE (Ministry of Environment, Water and Ecological Transition)
Document community health impacts from oil operations — report to the Defensoría del Pueblo
Use Ecuador's Constitutional protections for สิ่งแวดล้อม defenders
PetroEcuador: พัฒนา transition plan to phase out operations in ecologically sensitive areas
ดำเนินการ TCFD-aligned disclosure
ลงทุนใน remediation of legacy contamination (Lago Agrio)
MAATE: บังคับใช้ Yasuní referendum result and strengthen สิ่งแวดล้อม licensing
ARCERNNR: ปฏิรูป energy regulation to accelerate renewable deployment
SHE (Secretaría de Hidrocarburos del Ecuador): Align licensing with rights of nature framework
ติดต่อผู้แทนของคุณ Asambleísta in the Asamblea Nacional เพื่อเรียกร้อง implementation of the Yasuní referendum and extension to other sensitive areas
Leverage Ecuador's rights of nature framework in international climate negotiations
Support the Amazon Cooperation Treaty Organization (ACTO) for regional สิ่งแวดล้อม governance
ผลักดัน debt-for-nature swaps to finance the transition away from oil dependence
i: MAATE (Ministerio del Ambiente, Agua y Transición Ecológica) — Ecuador's environment ministry. Defensoría del Pueblo — the national ombudsman. Ecuador's 2008 Constitution (Articles 71-74) grants legally enforceable rights to nature (Pachamama), a global first.

EP PetroEcuador — the state oil company. PetroAmazonas EP — manages upstream operations in the Amazon basin. The Lago Agrio case (Chevron/Texaco) — one of the world's largest สิ่งแวดล้อม lawsuits over oil contamination in the Ecuadorian Amazon.
ARCERNNR (Agencia de Regulación y Control de Energía y Recursos Naturales No Renovables) — the energy and natural resources regulatory agency.

Asamblea Nacional del Ecuador — unicameral parliament (137 members). Contact through asambleanacional.gob.ec. Ecuador's rights of nature framework (2008 Constitution) and the 2023 Yasuní referendum are globally significant legal precedents for สิ่งแวดล้อม governance.

EE.s: Advanced digital เศรษฐกิจ ($43.1B GDP) with unique oil shale dependence (0.96% oil rents from kukersite extraction). Services-dominant (65.7% GDP). EU and NATO member. World leader in e-governance. Oil shale power generation is Estonia's largest source of CO₂ การปล่อยมลพิษ.

sectors.w: Estonia's oil shale sector is concentrated in Ida-Viru county (Eesti Energia/Enefit). EU ETS carbon costs make oil shale electricity the most expensive fossil option. เมื่อ carbon pricing fully applies, the ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อน between shale operators and electricity consumers breaks.
bp: Full EU ETS alignment without compensation. Oil shale electricity already costs more than wind in the Baltic. เมื่อ subsidies and free allowances are eliminated, ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อนใน oil shale generation breaks — renewables are cheaper.
Mandatory ต่อโรงงาน lifecycle การปล่อยมลพิษ and health-impact disclosure for oil shale processing. Estonia's detailed สิ่งแวดล้อม monitoring makes W computable.
ทำลายไม่ได้. Oil shale processing releases CO₂, particulate matter, and phenolic wastewater by physical and chemical process.
a: Report สิ่งแวดล้อม violations to Keskkonnaamet (Environmental Board)
Document health impacts in Ida-Viru communities
Use Estonian ผู้แจ้งเบาะแส law (rikkumisest teavitaja kaitse seadus, 2022)

ลงทุนใน Ida-Viru economic diversification
นำมาใช้ binding การปล่อยมลพิษ reduction targets
Konkurentsiamet: ปฏิรูป electricity tariffs to reflect full สิ่งแวดล้อม costs

ดำเนินการ just transition plan for Ida-Viru county

i: Keskkonnaamet (Environmental Board) — Estonia's สิ่งแวดล้อม enforcement and permitting authority. Keskkonnaministeerium (Ministry of the Environment) — oversees สิ่งแวดล้อม policy. Estonia transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.

Eesti Energia (Enefit) — the ของรัฐ energy company and dominant oil shale operator. Enefit operates the Narva power plants (the largest oil shale power plants in the world) and oil shale processing facilities.

Konkurentsiamet (Competition Authority) — also serves as Estonia's หน่วยงานกำกับดูแลพลังงาน. Ida-Viru county hosts ~90% of Estonia's oil shale operations and faces significant economic transition challenges.

Riigikogu — Estonia's unicameral parliament (101 members). Contact through riigikogu.ee. Estonia's Climate Ambition target includes significant การปล่อยมลพิษ reduction from the energy sector. EU Just Transition Fund — Estonia receives JTF funding for Ida-Viru transition.

EG.s: Largest Arab เศรษฐกิจ by population ($389.1B GDP). Oil and gas rents at 5.04%. Major gas producer (Zohr field, Mediterranean). เกษตรกรรมที่ 13.7% GDP. High military expenditure. Hosted COP27. Suez Canal provides strategic global trade leverage.

sectors.w: Egypt's Zohr gas field (discovered 2015) transformed Egypt from gas importer to exporter. COP27 presidency created domestic pressure for การปล่อยมลพิษ ความโปร่งใส. Per-field การปล่อยมลพิษ disclosure makes W computable.
bp: Redirect gas export revenue to solar energy development. Egypt's solar irradiance is among the world's highest. เมื่อ solar electricity undercuts gas-fired generation domestically, ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อนใน gas-for-domestic-power อ่อนแอลง.

ดำเนินการ ต่อแหล่ง การปล่อยมลพิษ disclosure for Zohr and other major fields. Egypt's COP27 commitments create institutional pressure — making lifecycle การปล่อยมลพิษ visible per unit of production makes W computable.
ทำลายไม่ได้ by policy alone. Gas combustion releases CO₂.
a: Report สิ่งแวดล้อม violations to EEAA (Egyptian Environmental Affairs Agency)
Document การปล่อยมลพิษ data through international partner channels (Eni, BP)

Eni (Zohr operator): ดำเนินการ การปล่อยมลพิษ reduction targets for Egyptian operations

NREA: Accelerate พลังงานหมุนเวียน permitting (Egypt targets 42% renewable electricity by 2035)

Leverage Egypt's COP27 presidency legacy to strengthen national climate commitments

i: EEAA (Egyptian Environmental Affairs Agency) — Egypt's สิ่งแวดล้อม regulatory body. EGPC (Egyptian General Petroleum Corporation) — the state oil and gas company. EGAS (Egyptian Natural Gas Holding Company) — manages natural gas operations. Note: Egypt has severe restrictions on ภาคประชาสังคม and press freedom. Whistleblower protections are minimal.
Eni — operates Zohr, the largest gas field in the Mediterranean. BP — major operator in the West Nile Delta. EGPC and EGAS manage state interests in all petroleum operations.

Ministry of Petroleum and Mineral Resources — oversees hydrocarbons policy. NREA (New and Renewable Energy Authority) — responsible for พลังงานหมุนเวียน development. Egypt's Integrated Sustainable Energy Strategy targets 42% renewable electricity by 2035.

Note: Egypt under President el-Sisi is rated 'Not Free' by Freedom House. The House of Representatives (Majlis al-Nuwab, 596 members) does not function as an independent democratic institution. International channels: Arab League, African Union (Egypt hosted AU in 2019), Union for the Mediterranean, COP27 legacy initiatives.

ET.s: Africa's second-most-populous country ($149.7B GDP). Agriculture dominates (34.8% GDP, primarily coffee, teff, livestock). Rapid industrialization drive (industrial parks). Major hydropower (GERD — Grand Ethiopian Renaissance Dam). Post-civil war recovery.

sectors.w: Ethiopia's agricultural expansion is the primary driver of การตัดไม้ทำลายป่า (fr=5.6% GDP equivalent in forest rents). เมื่อ per-farm สิ่งแวดล้อม data (tree cover, soil carbon) is linked to agricultural output, W คำนวณได้.
bp: Scale Ethiopia's Productive Safety Net Program (PSNP) to include สิ่งแวดล้อม conditionality. เมื่อ agricultural support payments require soil conservation and tree planting, ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อนใน clearing forest for short-term cultivation อ่อนแอลง.

Satellite-based monitoring of forest cover and ความเสื่อมโทรมของดิน published at woreda level. Ethiopia's Green Legacy Initiative provides political commitment — mandatory monitoring data makes W computable.

ทำลายได้บางส่วน. Subsistence agriculture on degraded land inherently affects soil and water systems. However, Ethiopia's traditional conservation agriculture (terracing, agroforestry) can reduce การพึ่งพาระบบ.
a: Report illegal การตัดไม้ทำลายป่า to regional สิ่งแวดล้อม protection authorities
Document land grabbing or forced displacement — report to EHRC (Ethiopian Human Rights Commission)
Report through agricultural development agent (DA) networks at kebele level
Ethiopian Commodity Exchange (ECX): Integrate สิ่งแวดล้อม certification into coffee and sesame trading
Agricultural investment companies: นำมาใช้ สิ่งแวดล้อม impact monitoring
Support Green Legacy Initiative reforestation targets
Ministry of Agriculture: ปฏิรูป the Productive Safety Net Program to include สิ่งแวดล้อม conditionality
EFCCC: เสริมสร้าง forest protection enforcement

Support African Forest Landscape Restoration Initiative (AFR100) targets for Ethiopia

ผลักดัน international climate finance for Ethiopia's agricultural transformation
Support Nile Basin Initiative cooperation on sustainable watershed management
i: Regional สิ่งแวดล้อม protection authorities — Ethiopia's federal system devolves สิ่งแวดล้อม management to regional states. EHRC (Ethiopian Human Rights Commission) — the national human rights institution. พัฒนาment Agents (DAs) — government agricultural extension workers deployed at kebele (ward) level throughout rural Ethiopia.

ECX (Ethiopian Commodity Exchange) — the commodities trading platform for coffee, sesame, and other agricultural products. Ethiopia is Africa's largest coffee producer and coffee is the country's largest export. Industrial parks development corporation — manages Ethiopia's growing manufacturing sector.

Ministry of Agriculture — oversees agricultural policy and the PSNP. EFCCC (Environment, Forest and Climate Change Commission) — Ethiopia's หน่วยงานด้านสิ่งแวดล้อม. Green Legacy Initiative — the government's flagship reforestation program targeting 20 billion seedlings.

Note: Ethiopia is a federal รัฐสภา republic but democratic governance has been constrained by civil conflict (Tigray war 2020-2022). The House of Peoples' Representatives (547 members) is the lower house. International channels: African Union (HQ in Addis Ababa), Nile Basin Initiative, IGAD (Intergovernmental Authority on พัฒนาment), AFR100 (Africa's contribution to the Bonn Challenge on forest restoration).

FI.s: Advanced Nordic เศรษฐกิจ ($298.7B GDP) with strong forestry sector. ภาคบริการที่ 62.2% GDP, manufacturing at 14.2%. High healthcare expenditure (10.47% GDP). Major pulp and paper producers (UPM, Stora Enso, Metsä Group). สมาชิกสหภาพยุโรป with robust สิ่งแวดล้อม regulation.

sectors.w: Finland's forestry-driven monoculture (pine/spruce plantations replacing natural forests) reduces biodiversity and degrades peatland carbon stocks. เมื่อ per-harvest biodiversity and carbon data is published alongside timber revenue, W คำนวณได้.
bp: ปฏิรูป EU CAP and national forestry subsidies to reward biodiversity and carbon storage rather than timber volume. เมื่อ subsidies incentivize continuous-cover forestry over clear-cutting, ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อนใน plantation monoculture อ่อนแอลง.

Mandatory per-harvest สิ่งแวดล้อม data (biodiversity indicators, soil carbon, water quality). Finland's Metsähallitus (state forest enterprise) already collects extensive data — making it publicly accessible makes W computable.
ทำลายได้บางส่วน. Timber plantation inherently reduces biodiversity compared to natural forest. However, continuous-cover forestry and extended rotation lengths can significantly reduce การพึ่งพาระบบ.
a: Report forestry violations to ELY-keskus (Centre for Economic พัฒนาment, Transport and the Environment)
Document biodiversity loss in logged areas — report to SYKE (Finnish Environment Institute)
Use Finnish ผู้แจ้งเบาะแส law (ilmoittajansuojelulaki, 2023)
UPM, Stora Enso, Metsä Group: นำมาใช้ continuous-cover forestry targets
ดำเนินการ per-harvest biodiversity monitoring
ลงทุนใน high-value wood products to reduce harvest volume dependency
MMM (Ministry of Agriculture and Forestry): ปฏิรูป the National Forest Strategy toward biodiversity targets
SYKE: Publish annual forest biodiversity monitoring data at municipality level
เสริมสร้าง EU Nature Restoration Law implementation in forestry sector
ติดต่อผู้แทนของคุณ member of the Eduskunta เพื่อเรียกร้อง reform of forestry subsidies toward biodiversity and carbon storage
Support EU Nature Restoration Law implementation
Advocate for HELCOM enforcement on Baltic Sea eutrophication from forestry runoff
ผลักดัน inclusion of forestry carbon accounting in Finland's climate targets
i: ELY-keskus — regional authorities responsible for สิ่งแวดล้อม monitoring and enforcement. SYKE (Suomen ympäristökeskus / Finnish Environment Institute) — the national สิ่งแวดล้อม research and monitoring institute. Ilmoittajansuojelulaki (Whistleblower Protection Act, 2023) — Finnish transposition of EU Whistleblower Directive.

UPM-Kymmene — one of Finland's largest forestry companies. Stora Enso — Finnish-Swedish forestry and paper company. Metsä Group — cooperative of 100,000+ Finnish forest owners. Metsähallitus — state enterprise managing one-third of Finland's land area.

MMM (Maa- ja metsätalousministeriö) — the ministry responsible for agriculture and forestry policy. National Forest Strategy 2025 — Finland's strategic framework for forestry sector development. EU Nature Restoration Law — requires restoration of degraded ecosystems including forests.

Eduskunta (Parliament of Finland) — unicameral legislature with 200 members. Contact through eduskunta.fi. The Maa- ja metsätalousvaliokunta (Agriculture and Forestry Committee) handles forestry legislation. Finland's climate law targets carbon neutrality by 2035.

GA.s: Oil-dependent Central African เศรษฐกิจ ($20.9B GDP) with 15.83% combined oil and gas rents. 88% forest cover — one of the world's most forested countries. Low population (2.4M). Military coup August 2023 ended the Bongo family's 55-year rule.

sectors.w: Gabon's oil production is in terminal decline from mature fields (peaked at ~370,000 bpd in 1997, now ~200,000). As production falls, the ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อน between operators and government revenue อ่อนแอลง. Gabon's forests offer alternative revenue through carbon credits.
bp: Monetize Gabon's forest carbon stocks through REDD+ and voluntary carbon markets. Gabon received $17M from Norway for forest protection in 2021 — scaling this replaces declining oil revenue and breaks ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อนใน extraction.
ดำเนินการ ต่อแหล่ง การปล่อยมลพิษ disclosure for all operators (TotalEnergies, Perenco, Assala Energy). Making สิ่งแวดล้อม costs visible makes W computable.
ทำลายไม่ได้ by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

Document oil spills or contamination — report through operator compliance channels

i: ANPN (Agence Nationale des Parcs Nationaux) — manages Gabon's 13 national parks (covering 11% of territory). GOC (Gabon Oil Company) — the state oil company. EITI Gabon — member since 2004. Note: Gabon is under military transition government since August 2023 coup.
TotalEnergies — the largest oil producer in Gabon. Perenco, Assala Energy — other major operators. GOC (Gabon Oil Company) — the state oil company.
Ministry of Hydrocarbons — oversees oil and gas policy. DGEPN (Direction Générale de l'Environnement et de la Protection de la Nature) — สิ่งแวดล้อม directorate.

Note: Gabon is under military transition government (Comité pour la Transition et la Restauration des Institutions, CTRI) since August 2023. Democratic institutions are suspended. International channels: CEMAC, CAFI, African Union, OPEC membership. Gabon's 2021 deal with Norway's sovereign wealth fund for forest protection is a model for forest-state climate finance.

GE.s: Small South Caucasus เศรษฐกิจ ($34.2B GDP) with เหมืองแร่ sector (1.28% GDP, primarily manganese and copper). Services-dominant (62% GDP). ผู้สมัครสหภาพยุโรป country (2023). Significant hydropower potential. Political tensions between pro-EU and pro-Russia orientations.

sectors.w: Georgia's manganese เหมืองแร่ (Chiatura) and copper เหมืองแร่ generate significant water pollution. EU accession สิ่งแวดล้อม alignment will require improved monitoring. เมื่อ water quality data is linked to เหมืองแร่ output, W คำนวณได้.
bp: EU accession สิ่งแวดล้อม alignment. เมื่อ Georgia must meet EU สิ่งแวดล้อม standards for เหมืองแร่, ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อนใน low-cost extraction without สิ่งแวดล้อม controls อ่อนแอลง.
Mandatory ต่อเหมือง water quality and การปล่อยมลพิษ disclosure. Georgia's National Environmental Agency collects some data — extending to public disclosure makes W computable.
ทำลายได้บางส่วน. Mining disturbs landscapes, but improved tailings management can reduce การพึ่งพาระบบ.
a: Report สิ่งแวดล้อม violations to the Environmental Information and Education Centre
Document water contamination — report to NEA (National Environmental Agency)
Use Georgia's ผู้แจ้งเบาะแส protection mechanisms
Georgian Manganese (Euroasian Resources Group subsidiary): ดำเนินการ สิ่งแวดล้อม management systems
นำมาใช้ international เหมืองแร่ standards (ICMM, IRMA)
ลงทุนใน mine site rehabilitation
NAPR (National Agency of Public Registry): เสริมสร้าง เหมืองแร่ license สิ่งแวดล้อม conditions
NEA: Increase สิ่งแวดล้อม monitoring capacity
Ministry of Economy: Align เหมืองแร่ regulation with EU สิ่งแวดล้อม acquis

Support EU accession conditionality on สิ่งแวดล้อม governance
Advocate for Energy Community Treaty enforcement on สิ่งแวดล้อม standards

i: NEA (National Environmental Agency) — responsible for สิ่งแวดล้อม monitoring, permitting, and enforcement. Ministry of Environmental Protection and Agriculture — oversees สิ่งแวดล้อม and agricultural policy. Georgia's Law on Freedom of Speech and Expression provides some protections for reporting.

Georgian Manganese — subsidiary of ERG (Eurasian Resources Group), operating the Chiatura manganese mines. RMG Copper — operates copper mines. Georgia's เหมืองแร่ sector is primarily controlled by international investors.
National Agency of Mines — responsible for เหมืองแร่ licensing and oversight. Georgia's EU Association Agreement (2014) includes provisions for สิ่งแวดล้อม alignment.

Sakartvelos Parlamenti (Parliament of Georgia) — unicameral legislature with 150 members. Contact through parliament.ge. Georgia is an ผู้สมัครสหภาพยุโรป country (2023) and aspirant to full สมาชิกสหภาพยุโรปship. EU Association Agreement — includes Deep and Comprehensive Free Trade Area (DCFTA) with สิ่งแวดล้อม provisions.

GH.s: West African เศรษฐกิจ ($82.3B GDP) with significant oil (4.06% rents), gold เหมืองแร่ (5.17% mineral rents), and cocoa agriculture (20.9% ag share). One of Africa's most stable democracies. Debt crisis (2022 IMF bailout). Illegal artisanal gold เหมืองแร่ (galamsey) is a major สิ่งแวดล้อม crisis.

sectors.w: Ghana's galamsey (illegal artisanal เหมืองแร่) crisis has contaminated water bodies across cocoa-growing regions. เมื่อ ต่อเหมือง water quality data is published and linked to gold production, W คำนวณได้. The galamsey problem is so severe that it threatens Ghana's water supply.
bp: Formalize artisanal เหมืองแร่ with สิ่งแวดล้อม standards and alternative livelihood programs. เมื่อ legal small-scale เหมืองแร่ provides comparable income with less สิ่งแวดล้อม damage, ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อนใน illegal extraction อ่อนแอลง.
Satellite-based water quality monitoring linked to เหมืองแร่ areas. Ghana's Water Resources Commission already monitors water quality — extending to real-time public data makes W computable.
ทำลายได้บางส่วน. Mining disturbs landscapes. However, formalized artisanal เหมืองแร่ with mercury-free processing (e.g., gravity separation) can significantly reduce การพึ่งพาระบบ.
a: Report illegal galamsey operations to the Inter-Ministerial Committee on Illegal Mining (IMCIM)
Document water contamination — report to WRC (Water Resources Commission)
Report through the Minerals Commission complaint mechanisms
Gold Fields, Newmont, AngloGold Ashanti: Support formalization of artisanal เหมืองแร่ near concessions
ดำเนินการ community development agreements per Ghana's เหมืองแร่ law
นำมาใช้ mercury-free processing technology transfer programs
Minerals Commission: Accelerate small-scale เหมืองแร่ formalization with สิ่งแวดล้อม standards
EPA (Environmental Protection Agency): เสริมสร้าง enforcement against water pollution from เหมืองแร่
Forestry Commission: Protect forest reserves from galamsey encroachment
ติดต่อผู้แทนของคุณ Member of Parliament เพื่อเรียกร้อง emergency action on the galamsey water contamination crisis
Support EITI enhanced reporting with สิ่งแวดล้อม metrics
สนับสนุนผ่าน ECOWAS for regional artisanal เหมืองแร่ regulation
ผลักดัน Minamata Convention enforcement on mercury use in gold เหมืองแร่
i: IMCIM (Inter-Ministerial Committee on Illegal Mining) — established to coordinate government response to the galamsey crisis. WRC (Water Resources Commission) — manages Ghana's water resources and monitors water quality. Minerals Commission — the regulatory body for the เหมืองแร่ sector, responsible for licensing and compliance monitoring.

Gold Fields — operates Tarkwa and Damang mines. Newmont — operates Ahafo and Akyem mines. AngloGold Ashanti — major gold เหมืองแร่ company with Ghanaian operations. Ghana is Africa's largest gold producer.

EPA (Environmental Protection Agency of Ghana) — responsible for สิ่งแวดล้อม permitting, monitoring, and enforcement. Forestry Commission — manages Ghana's forest reserves, many of which are threatened by illegal เหมืองแร่. EITI Ghana — Ghana has been EITI compliant since 2010.

Parliament of Ghana — unicameral legislature with 275 members. Contact through parliament.gh. Ghana is a presidential ประชาธิปไตย with peaceful transfers of power. Minamata Convention on Mercury — Ghana has ratified this treaty requiring phase-down of mercury use in artisanal gold เหมืองแร่.

GN.s: Resource-rich West African เศรษฐกิจ ($25B GDP) with massive bauxite reserves (world's largest — 7.4B tons). เกษตรกรรมที่ 31% GDP. Military junta since 2021 coup. Guinea supplies ~25% of global bauxite (the ore used to produce aluminum).

sectors.w: Guinea's bauxite เหมืองแร่ displaces communities and contaminates water sources. As aluminum buyers face ESG pressure (EU CSRD, Apple/Tesla supply chain requirements), making ต่อเหมือง สิ่งแวดล้อม data visible breaks system independence.
bp: International supply chain due diligence (EU CSDDD) requiring สิ่งแวดล้อม and human rights compliance for bauxite. เมื่อ buyers must verify mine-level conditions, ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อนใน low-cost, unregulated extraction อ่อนแอลง.
Per-mine สิ่งแวดล้อม and community impact disclosure through EITI and supply chain traceability. เมื่อ downstream manufacturers can see the welfare cost per ton of bauxite, W คำนวณได้.
ทำลายได้บางส่วน. Open-pit bauxite เหมืองแร่ inherently disturbs landscapes. However, progressive rehabilitation and dust suppression can reduce การพึ่งพาระบบ.
a: Report สิ่งแวดล้อม violations to international monitoring organizations (Human Rights Watch, Inclusive พัฒนาment International)
Document community displacement — report through international accountability mechanisms
Report through เหมืองแร่ company compliance channels (Rio Tinto, Alcoa, Emirates Global Aluminium)
CBG (Compagnie des Bauxites de Guinée), SMB (Société Minière de Boké): ดำเนินการ community resettlement standards per IFC Performance Standard 5
นำมาใช้ ASI (Aluminium Stewardship Initiative) certification
ลงทุนใน progressive rehabilitation of mined areas
Ministry of Mines: บังคับใช้ 2011 Mining Code สิ่งแวดล้อม provisions
CPDM (Centre de Promotion et de Développement Minier): เสริมสร้าง สิ่งแวดล้อม monitoring capacity
EITI Guinea: Expand reporting to สิ่งแวดล้อม and community data
สนับสนุนผ่าน ECOWAS for return to democratic governance and strengthened เหมืองแร่ regulation
Support EU CSDDD implementation requiring due diligence for bauxite imports from Guinea
ผลักดัน ASI certification as condition for international bauxite purchases
Support international accountability mechanisms for เหมืองแร่-affected communities
i: Note: Guinea is under military rule (CNRD — Comité National du Rassemblement et du Développement) since September 2021. Independent ภาคประชาสังคม operates under severe constraints. Bureau Guinéen des Études et Évaluations Environnementales (BGEEE) — สิ่งแวดล้อม assessment authority. International monitoring: Human Rights Watch and Inclusive พัฒนาment International have documented impacts of bauxite เหมืองแร่ on Guinean communities.

CBG (Compagnie des Bauxites de Guinée) — JV of Alcoa, Rio Tinto, and Dadco, one of the world's largest bauxite producers. SMB (Société Minière de Boké) — Chinese-backed consortium (includes Winning International, Shandong Weiqiao). GAC (Guinea Alumina Corporation) — Emirates Global Aluminium subsidiary. ASI (Aluminium Stewardship Initiative) — the industry sustainability standard for the aluminum value chain.

Ministère des Mines et de la Géologie — oversees เหมืองแร่ policy and licensing. Code Minier (2011, revised 2013) — Guinea's เหมืองแร่ code establishing สิ่งแวดล้อม obligations. EITI Guinea — Guinea has been EITI compliant, publishing reports on เหมืองแร่ revenues.

Note: Guinea's democratic institutions are suspended under military rule. The Conseil National de la Transition (CNT) serves as a transitional legislature. International channels: ECOWAS (Guinea suspended), African Union, international เหมืองแร่ company home-country oversight (UK, Canada, UAE, China). EU Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence Directive (CSDDD) — will require EU companies to address human rights and สิ่งแวดล้อม impacts in their supply chains.

GQ.s: Small petrostate ($12.8B GDP) with 21.57% combined oil and gas rents. One of Africa's highest per-capita GDPs but extreme inequality. Authoritarian rule (Obiang family since 1979 — world's longest-serving head of state). Oil production declining from mature fields.

sectors.w: Equatorial Guinea's oil production has declined ~75% from peak. As fields deplete, the ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อน between operators and government revenue อ่อนแอลง. Without new discoveries, the economic case for diversification becomes unavoidable.
bp: Economic diversification as oil depletes. เมื่อ production revenue falls below government operating costs, ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อนใน continued extraction from depleting fields breaks — alternative revenue sources become necessary.
Per-field การปล่อยมลพิษ disclosure through international operator reporting (ExxonMobil, Marathon Oil). Making สิ่งแวดล้อม costs visible makes W computable.
ทำลายไม่ได้ by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.
a: Report through international operator compliance channels (ExxonMobil, Marathon Oil)
Document สิ่งแวดล้อม violations to international NGOs
Report corruption to US DOJ (several Obiang family members have faced kleptocracy investigations)
ExxonMobil, Marathon Oil: Apply global สิ่งแวดล้อม standards to EG operations
Report Scope 1-3 การปล่อยมลพิษ for EG operations in global ESG disclosures
ดำเนินการ community development programs
Ministry of Mines and Hydrocarbons: Publish production and revenue data through EITI (EG was suspended from EITI in 2010)
เสริมสร้าง สิ่งแวดล้อม standards for offshore operations
BEAC: Improve fiscal ความโปร่งใส for hydrocarbon revenues
Support international anti-kleptocracy enforcement for misappropriated oil revenues
สนับสนุนผ่าน CEMAC for regional ความโปร่งใส standards
ผลักดัน re-engagement with EITI ความโปร่งใส requirements
Support international mechanisms for asset recovery and repatriation of stolen oil revenues
i: Note: Equatorial Guinea is one of the world's most เผด็จการ states. No independent media, ภาคประชาสังคม, or labor organizations exist. EG LNG (Equatorial Guinea LNG Holdings) — operates the LNG processing plant. International engagement: US Department of Justice Kleptocracy Asset Recovery Initiative has investigated Obiang family assets. Transparency International consistently ranks Equatorial Guinea among the most corrupt countries.
ExxonMobil — the largest oil operator in Equatorial Guinea. Marathon Oil — operates in offshore blocks. GEPetrol — the state national oil company.

Ministry of Mines and Hydrocarbons — oversees oil and gas operations. Note: Equatorial Guinea was suspended from EITI in 2010 for insufficient progress on ความโปร่งใส. BEAC (central bank of CEMAC zone) provides limited macroeconomic oversight.

Note: Equatorial Guinea under President Obiang (in power since 1979) has no democratic institutions. The Cámara de Representantes del Pueblo and Senate are rubber-stamp bodies. International channels: CEMAC, African Union, UN Human Rights Council. Several countries (US, France, Switzerland) have pursued legal action against Obiang family members for corruption and money laundering.

GR.s: EU เศรษฐกิจ ($256.2B GDP) with dominant services sector (68% GDP, tourism-heavy). Low resource extraction. Post-debt-crisis recovery. Major shipping industry (Greek-owned fleet is the world's largest). เกษตรกรรมที่ 3.8% GDP (olives, wine).

sectors.w: Greece's Mediterranean diet is being displaced by UPF consumption, contributing to rising obesity (Greece has one of Europe's highest childhood obesity rates). เมื่อ diet-related healthcare costs are published per product category through EOPYY health insurance data, W คำนวณได้.
bp: ดำเนินการ front-of-pack health labelling to make welfare costs visible to consumers. เมื่อ UPF health costs are visible at point of sale, the ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อน between processors and retailers in high-margin UPF อ่อนแอลง.

EOPYY (National Organization for the Provision of Healthcare Services) publication of diet-attributable disease costs per food category. Greece's national health system generates data to make W computable.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. ปฏิรูปulation mandates can reduce การพึ่งพาระบบ.

Document food safety violations

Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy implementation
Advocate for UNESCO Intangible Heritage protection of Mediterranean diet through policy measures

i: EFET (ΕΦΕΤ — Ενιαίος Φορέας Ελέγχου Τροφίμων / Hellenic Food Authority) — Greece's food safety authority. Greece transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.

SEVT (Σύνδεσμος Ελληνικών Βιομηχανιών Τροφίμων / Federation of Hellenic Food Industries) — the food industry trade association. Greece's traditional food sector (olive oil, dairy, honey) provides a competitive alternative to UPF.

Ministry of Health — oversees health policy. EOPYY (Εθνικός Οργανισμός Παροχής Υπηρεσιών Υγείας / National Organization for the Provision of Healthcare Services) — the national health insurer managing healthcare expenditure data.
Βουλή των Ελλήνων (Hellenic Parliament) — unicameral legislature with 300 members. Contact through hellenicparliament.gr. Greece is a รัฐสภา ประชาธิปไตย and สมาชิกสหภาพยุโรป.

GT.s: Central American เศรษฐกิจ ($113.2B GDP) with agriculture at 9.8% GDP (coffee, sugar, palm oil). Mining at 1.12% GDP (gold, silver — Marlin mine controversy). High inequality and indigenous population (40%+). Remittances significant (~18% of GDP).

sectors.w: Guatemala's palm oil expansion into Petén and Alta Verapaz drives การตัดไม้ทำลายป่า and displaces indigenous communities. เมื่อ per-farm การตัดไม้ทำลายป่า data is linked to palm oil exports (EUDR compliance), W คำนวณได้.
bp: EU Deforestation Regulation compliance requiring farm-level traceability. เมื่อ palm oil exports must prove zero-การตัดไม้ทำลายป่า origin, ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อนใน clearing forest for plantations breaks.

Mandatory per-farm สิ่งแวดล้อม data (tree cover, water use, pesticide application). Guatemala's CONAP (National Council for Protected Areas) can provide monitoring data — linking to agricultural output makes W computable.
ทำลายได้บางส่วน. Palm oil monoculture reduces biodiversity. However, agroforestry integration and RSPO certification can reduce การพึ่งพาระบบ.
a: Report illegal การตัดไม้ทำลายป่า to CONAP or INAB (National Forest Institute)
Document indigenous land rights violations — report to PDH (Procuraduría de los Derechos Humanos)
Report pesticide violations to MAGA (Ministry of Agriculture)
Palm oil companies (REPSA, NaturAceites): นำมาใช้ RSPO certification and zero-การตัดไม้ทำลายป่า commitments

MARN (Ministry of Environment): เสริมสร้าง สิ่งแวดล้อม impact assessment for agricultural expansion

CONAP: บังคับใช้ protected area boundaries against agricultural encroachment

Support ILO Convention 169 enforcement on indigenous consultation
Advocate for Escazú Agreement ratification
ผลักดัน EUDR compliance support for small-scale farmers
i: CONAP (Consejo Nacional de Áreas Protegidas) — manages Guatemala's protected areas. INAB (Instituto Nacional de Bosques) — the national forest institute. PDH (Procuraduría de los Derechos Humanos) — the national human rights ombudsman. Guatemala has significant challenges with สิ่งแวดล้อม defender safety.

REPSA (Reforestadora de Palma del Petén) — major palm oil producer. GREPALMA (Gremial de Palmicultores de Guatemala) — the palm oil producers' association. RSPO (Roundtable on Sustainable น้ำมันปาล์ม) — the international certification standard.
MARN (Ministerio de Ambiente y Recursos Naturales) — Guatemala's environment ministry. MAGA (Ministerio de Agricultura, Ganadería y Alimentación) — the agriculture ministry.

Congreso de la República de Guatemala — unicameral legislature with 160 members. Guatemala has ratified ILO Convention 169 on indigenous peoples' rights. The Inter-American Court of Human Rights has issued rulings on indigenous land rights in Guatemala.

GY.s: Fastest-growing เศรษฐกิจ globally ($24.7B GDP, up from $5.5B in 2019) due to massive offshore oil discoveries (Stabroek block). ค่าเช่าน้ำมัน at 22.08%, เหมืองแร่ at 9.38% (gold, bauxite). Small population (800K). At risk of 'resource curse' — extraordinary PST exposure from rapid petro-development.

sectors.w: Guyana's 2016 production sharing agreement with ExxonMobil has been widely criticized for giving the government only 2% royalty + 50% profit oil (after cost recovery). เมื่อ the full fiscal terms and สิ่งแวดล้อม costs are disclosed and understood, W คำนวณได้ from production data.
bp: Renegotiate the Stabroek PSA fiscal terms to capture a fair share of petroleum wealth. เมื่อ Guyana's government share approaches international norms (60-80% government take), ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อนใน an extractive-favorable contract อ่อนแอลง.

Mandatory ต่อแหล่ง การปล่อยมลพิษ disclosure and สิ่งแวดล้อม monitoring for all Stabroek block operations. ExxonMobil already reports global การปล่อยมลพิษ — extending to ต่อแหล่ง Guyana data makes W computable.
ทำลายไม่ได้ by policy alone. Offshore oil production and combustion release CO₂.
a: Report สิ่งแวดล้อม violations to EPA (Environmental Protection Agency of Guyana)
Document compliance gaps in Stabroek operations — report through ExxonMobil compliance channels
Report fiscal irregularities to the Audit Office of Guyana
ExxonMobil, Hess, CNOOC (Stabroek partners): ดำเนินการ ต่อแหล่ง การปล่อยมลพิษ disclosure for Guyana operations
นำมาใช้ zero-flaring targets
ลงทุนใน oil spill response capacity (current capacity is minimal for deepwater operations)
EPA: เสริมสร้าง สิ่งแวดล้อม monitoring capacity for offshore operations
Ministry of Natural Resources: Commission independent review of Stabroek PSA terms
Natural Resource Fund Board: ดำเนินการ transparent investment and withdrawal rules
ติดต่อผู้แทนของคุณ Member of Parliament in the National Assembly เพื่อเรียกร้อง independent review of Stabroek PSA fiscal terms
Support establishment of a properly resourced Petroleum Commission as independent regulator
Advocate for Natural Resource Fund ความโปร่งใส aligned with Santiago Principles for sovereign wealth funds
ผลักดัน Norwegian-style petroleum governance model with high government take and transparent wealth fund management
i: EPA (Environmental Protection Agency of Guyana) — responsible for สิ่งแวดล้อม permitting and monitoring of oil and gas operations. Ministry of Natural Resources — oversees petroleum policy. Audit Office of Guyana — conducts financial audits of government revenue management. Note: Guyana's regulatory capacity is severely under-resourced relative to the scale of oil development.

ExxonMobil (45%), Hess (30%), CNOOC (25%) — the Stabroek block partnership. Production began in 2019 and is expected to reach 1.2 million bpd by 2027. The Stabroek Production Sharing Agreement (2016) — governs fiscal terms. The Natural Resource Fund — Guyana's sovereign wealth fund established in 2019 to manage oil revenues.
Natural Resource Fund Act (2021) — governs the sovereign wealth fund. The Petroleum Commission (planned) — intended to serve as the independent petroleum regulator, but not yet fully established.

National Assembly of Guyana — unicameral legislature with 65 members. Guyana is a cooperative republic with Westminster-style รัฐสภา ประชาธิปไตย. The Natural Resource Governance Institute (NRGI) provides technical assistance on petroleum governance. CARICOM — provides regional coordination.

HK.s: Global financial center ($406.9B GDP) with 91.8% services. Major banking and securities hub. Under Chinese sovereignty since 1997 with eroding autonomy. Significant financial intermediation — Hong Kong Stock Exchange is 5th-largest globally by market cap.

sectors.w: Hong Kong intermediates massive capital flows including fossil fuel financing. เมื่อ Scope 3 financed การปล่อยมลพิษ are disclosed per financial institution, W คำนวณได้ from financial transaction data.
bp: Mandatory financed การปล่อยมลพิษ disclosure for all HKEX-listed financial institutions. เมื่อ banks must disclose the การปล่อยมลพิษ their lending supports, ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อนใน fossil fuel financing อ่อนแอลง — ESG-aware investors reallocate.
HKMA Green and Sustainable Finance Cross-Agency Steering Group implementation. Making climate risk visible in financial products makes W computable.
ทำลายได้บางส่วน. Financial intermediation can relocate. But Hong Kong's infrastructure and China market access create switching costs.

Document ESG disclosure violations — report to HKEX listing division

Set financed การปล่อยมลพิษ reduction targets
Integrate climate risk into lending decisions

SFC: บังคับใช้ enhanced ESG disclosure for listed companies
HKEX: เสริมสร้าง climate-related listing requirements
สนับสนุนผ่าน IOSCO for global securities regulator coordination on climate disclosure
Support ISSB sustainability reporting standards adoption in Hong Kong
ผลักดัน Network for Greening the Financial System (NGFS) recommendations implementation
Leverage Hong Kong's role as a Belt and Road financing hub to require climate standards
i: SFC (Securities and Futures Commission) — regulates securities, futures markets, and listed companies. HKEX (Hong Kong Exchanges and Clearing) — operates the stock exchange and sets listing rules including ESG disclosure requirements. HKMA (Hong Kong Monetary Authority) — the de facto central bank. Note: Under the National Security Law (2020), civil liberties are constrained.

Major banks in Hong Kong: HSBC, Standard Chartered, Bank of China (Hong Kong), Hang Seng Bank. Green and Sustainable Finance Cross-Agency Steering Group — coordinates climate finance policy across HKMA, SFC, and other regulators.
HKMA — supervises 160+ licensed banks. The HKMA's Climate Risk Management Supervisory Policy Manual (2021) sets expectations for banks' climate risk management.

Note: Hong Kong's Legislative Council (90 members) is not freely elected under the 2021 electoral reform. International engagement operates through financial regulatory cooperation (IOSCO, BIS, NGFS) and Hong Kong's role as an international financial center.

HN.s: Lower-middle-income เศรษฐกิจ ($37.1B GDP) with agriculture at 11.2% GDP (coffee, palm oil, bananas). การผลิตที่ 14.9% (maquiladora sector). Climate-vulnerable — Hurricane Mitch (1998) and Eta/Iota (2020). High emigration. Environmental defenders face severe threats.

sectors.w: Honduras's palm oil expansion drives การตัดไม้ทำลายป่า in the Aguán Valley and Mosquitia region. EUDR compliance will require farm-level traceability — when การตัดไม้ทำลายป่า is linked to specific supply chains, W คำนวณได้.
bp: EUDR compliance requiring zero-การตัดไม้ทำลายป่า traceability for palm oil exports. เมื่อ buyers must verify origin, ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อนใน forest conversion for plantations breaks.
Satellite-based การตัดไม้ทำลายป่า monitoring linked to agricultural export data. ICF (Forest Conservation Institute) data makes W computable.
ทำลายได้บางส่วน. Palm oil monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. RSPO certification and agroforestry can reduce การพึ่งพาระบบ.
a: Report illegal การตัดไม้ทำลายป่า to ICF (Instituto de Conservación Forestal)
Document land rights violations — report to CONADEH (Comisionado Nacional de los Derechos Humanos)
Report through RSPO complaint mechanisms
Palm oil companies (Dinant, Jaremar): นำมาใช้ RSPO certification and zero-การตัดไม้ทำลายป่า commitments

MiAmbiente+: เสริมสร้าง สิ่งแวดล้อม impact assessment for agricultural expansion
SAG (Secretariat of Agriculture): ปฏิรูป agricultural incentives
ICF: บังคับใช้ protected area boundaries
ติดต่อผู้แทนของคุณ Diputado in the Congreso Nacional เพื่อเรียกร้อง enforcement of สิ่งแวดล้อม protections
Support Escazú Agreement ratification for protection of สิ่งแวดล้อม defenders

ผลักดัน international accountability for violence against สิ่งแวดล้อม defenders
i: ICF (Instituto de Conservación Forestal) — responsible for forest management and conservation. CONADEH — the national human rights commissioner. Note: Honduras is one of the most dangerous countries for สิ่งแวดล้อม defenders — Global Witness documents multiple killings annually.

Corporación Dinant — Honduras's largest palm oil producer (implicated in Aguán Valley land conflicts). Jaremar — another major palm oil company. IFC (International Finance Corporation) — has faced accountability complaints regarding investments in Honduran palm oil.
MiAmbiente+ (Secretaría de Recursos Naturales y Ambiente) — Honduras's environment ministry. SAG (Secretaría de Agricultura y Ganadería) — the agriculture ministry.

Congreso Nacional de Honduras — unicameral legislature with 128 members. Honduras is a presidential ประชาธิปไตย. SICA (Sistema de la Integración Centroamericana) — the Central American integration system.

HR.s: EU and Eurozone member ($93B GDP) with dominant services sector (60.8% GDP, tourism-heavy). Small oil sector (INA, partially owned by MOL). เกษตรกรรมที่ 2.9% GDP. Joined the euro and Schengen in 2023.

sectors.w: Croatia's EU-integrated health insurance system (HZZO) tracks healthcare costs. Publishing diet-attributable disease costs per product category makes W computable from retail sales data.
bp: ดำเนินการ EU front-of-pack health labelling. Makes welfare costs visible to consumers.
HZZO publication of diet-attributable healthcare cost data. Croatia's universal health insurance generates data to make W computable.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. ปฏิรูปulation mandates reduce การพึ่งพาระบบ.

Use EU Whistleblower Directive protections (transposed 2022)

Commission health-impact assessments

HAH: เสริมสร้าง marketing claim enforcement
HZZO: Publish diet-related expenditure data

Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy
Advocate for WHO-aligned UPF marketing restrictions
i: HAH (Hrvatska agencija za hranu / Croatian Food Agency) — food safety authority. AZTN (Agencija za zaštitu tržišnog natjecanja) — competition authority. Croatia transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.
Podravka, Kraš — major Croatian food companies. Agrokor/Fortenova Group — the largest food and retail conglomerate in Southeast Europe.
HZZO (Hrvatski zavod za zdravstveno osiguranje) — Croatia's health insurance fund. Ministry of Health oversees nutrition policy.
Hrvatski sabor (Croatian Parliament) — unicameral, 151 members. Contact through sabor.hr. Croatia is an EU and Eurozone member.

HT.s: Fragile state ($25.2B GDP) — Western Hemisphere's poorest country. เกษตรกรรมที่ 15.9% GDP (coffee, mangoes, cocoa). Extreme การตัดไม้ทำลายป่า (2% forest cover remaining). Gang violence and political instability. การผลิตที่ 26.2% GDP (garment assembly).

sectors.w: Haiti's near-total การตัดไม้ทำลายป่า (98% forest loss) means any remaining agriculture operates on severely degraded land. The การพึ่งพาระบบ is already partially broken — Haiti has experienced the endpoint of การตัดไม้ทำลายป่า-driven agricultural collapse. Reforestation is the intervention.
bp: ปฏิรูป agricultural support to incentivize tree planting and agroforestry. เมื่อ hillside farmers receive more support for tree crops (coffee, cocoa, fruit) than annual crops on degraded slopes, ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อนใน continued การตัดไม้ทำลายป่า breaks.
Satellite monitoring of remaining forest cover and soil erosion published at commune level. Making degradation visible makes W computable.

Extreme การพึ่งพาระบบ — 98% forest loss means agricultural activity on degraded slopes directly causes erosion, flooding, and further land degradation. Reforestation is the only path to reducing การพึ่งพาระบบ.
a: Document การตัดไม้ทำลายป่า through community organizations
Report illegal charcoal production to MDE (Ministry of Environment)
Engage international development organizations
International agricultural companies: Support sustainable supply chains from Haiti
ลงทุนใน tree crop processing (coffee, cacao, mango)
Charcoal alternatives: Support LPG transition programs
MDE: บังคับใช้ (to extent possible) remaining forest protections
MARNDR (Agriculture Ministry): Prioritize hillside agroforestry programs
ONEV: Support reforestation monitoring
Support international reforestation and land restoration programs for Haiti
สนับสนุนผ่าน CARICOM for regional สิ่งแวดล้อม support
ผลักดัน debt-for-nature swaps to finance reforestation
Support Haitian diaspora organizations working on สิ่งแวดล้อม restoration
i: MDE (Ministère de l'Environnement) — the environment ministry, severely under-resourced. Note: Haiti's state institutions are largely non-functional due to the ongoing security and governance crisis. International organizations (UN, USAID, EU) provide most สิ่งแวดล้อม programming.
Haiti's private sector is small. The Chambre de Commerce d'Haïti coordinates business activities. International NGOs (Partners in Health, Trees for the Future) implement many development programs.

MARNDR (Ministère de l'Agriculture, des Ressources Naturelles et du Développement Rural) — the agriculture ministry. ONEV (Observatoire National de l'Environnement et de la Vulnérabilité) — สิ่งแวดล้อม monitoring.

Note: Haiti's democratic institutions are non-functional — no elected parliament since 2023, no elected president. Transitional governance is underway. International channels: UN Integrated Office in Haiti (BINUH), CARICOM, OAS, Haitian diaspora organizations.

HU.s: สมาชิกสหภาพยุโรป ($222.7B GDP) with strong manufacturing (15.8% GDP, automotive-focused). ภาคบริการที่ 59.5% GDP. Small oil and gas sector (MOL Group). เกษตรกรรมที่ 2.7% GDP. Democratic backsliding under Orbán government has strained EU relations.

sectors.w: Hungary has one of Europe's highest obesity rates and introduced a 'chip tax' (NETA — népegészségügyi termékadó) on UPF in 2011. เมื่อ health insurance data (NEAK) links diet to healthcare costs per product category, W คำนวณได้.
bp: เสริมสร้าง the NETA tax and extend to broader UPF categories. Hungary's pioneering public health product tax อ่อนแอลง ผลประโยชน์ทับซ้อนใน high-margin UPF by internalizing health costs.
NEAK publication of diet-attributable healthcare expenditure. Hungary's health insurance system generates data to make W computable.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. ปฏิรูปulation targets can reduce การพึ่งพาระบบ.
